title: MOTHER AND BABY CLINIC - 211info
text: PROVIDENCE WILLAMETTE FALLS MEDICAL CENTER MOTHER AND BABY CLINIC MOTHER AND BABY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides lactation support. Lactation consultants evaluate babies for jaundice, feeding difficulties and weight gain. Also assesses milk supply, breast pain, and breastfeeding positioning. Services are provide virtually and in-person. 9155 SW Barnes Road Suite 730 Portland, OR 97225 Eligibility: All birthing persons, no matter where they delivered Hours: 7 days per week 9am-5pm (503) 216-4033 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 216-4033 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
